metadata.title: Code Files
metadata.description: Edit Code Files in Obsidian with VSCode's powerful Monaco Editor

regex.source: Notice("Your cursor is currently not in a valid code block.")
regex.target: Notice("你的光标当前不在有效的代码块中。")

regex.source: name:"Open current code block in Monaco Editor"
regex.target: name:"在 Monaco 编辑器中打开当前代码块"

regex.source: name:"Open current file in Monaco Editor"
regex.target: name:"在Monaco编辑器中打开当前文件"

regex.source: text:"If you change any settings, you need to reopen already opened files for the changes to take effect."
regex.target: text:"如果你更改了任何设置，你需要重新打开已打开的文件，以便更改生效。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Theme of the editor, defaults to dark or light based on the current editor theme.")
regex.target: .setDesc("编辑器主题，默认根据当前编辑器主题设置为深色或浅色。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Always use the background of Obsidian as background, instead of the theme default background. It's recommended to turn this off if you are using custom themes. Disable this if the text colors are illegible on Obsidians background.")
regex.target: .setDesc("始终使用 Obsidian 的背景作为背景，而不是主题默认背景。如果您使用自定义主题，建议关闭此功能。如果文本颜色在 Obsidian 的背景上难以辨认，请禁用此功能。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Files with these extensions will show up in the sidebar, and will be available to create new files from. Seperated by commas. Changes to the file extensions need a restart to take effect.")
regex.target: .setDesc("具有这些扩展名的文件将显示在侧边栏中，并且可用于从中创建新文件。用逗号分隔。对文件扩展名的更改需要重新启动才能生效。")
.setDesc("编辑器将显示语义验证错误。")
.setDesc("编辑器将显示语法验证错误。")
